apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-bad-f:
Error message when an Abstract Wikipedia fragment sent to the API is a not a well-formed JSON representation of a function call

{{doc-wikilambda}}
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-bad-r:
Error message when Abstract Wikipedia got an unexpected response from Wikifunctions after executing an Abstract Wikipedia content fragment

{{doc-wikilambda}}
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-forbi:
Error message when Abstract Wikipedia requested a fragment render to Wikifunctions but the fragment required a privileged user

{{doc-wikilambda}}
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-not-e:
Error message when Abstract Mode is not enabled or not properly configured

{{doc-wikilambda}}
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-retur:
Error message when Abstract Wikipedia requested a fragment render to Wikifunctions and got a Void response with a ZError in the metadata

{{doc-wikilambda}}
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-servi:
Error message when Abstract Wikipedia could not reach Wikifunctions for rendering a fragment

{{doc-wikilambda}}
apierror-abstractwiki_run_fragment-unkno:
Error message when an Abstract Wikipedia fragment could not be rendered due to an unhandled system error

{{doc-wikilambda}}
